subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath illumined the horizons with a light that hath shone forth and dawned from the horizon of Hijaz, whereby the realms of hearts were illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نور الافاق بنور اشرق و افاق من افق الحجاز و به نور آفاق قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @knowledge; recognition of God
